_note: Email campaign data for Sprinkler Guard. Drafts proposed by Jarvis based on real baseline report insights. Production version replaces this file with live Brevo API data.

proposed.name: Abandoned Cart Recovery
proposed.rationale: 80% of customers who add to cart never check out. Recovering even 15% of abandoned carts at the current $143 AOV adds an estimated $1,400/mo.

sequence.subject: You left your sprinkler protection in the cart
sequence.preview: We saved your spot. The damage you're trying to prevent isn't waiting.

sequence.subject: One mower hit costs more than your whole cart
sequence.preview: Real story from a customer in Texas — and what it cost him.

sequence.subject: Last chance: 10% off your Sprinkler Guard order
sequence.preview: We rarely discount. This expires in 24 hours.

proposed.name: New Customer Welcome Series
proposed.rationale: Welcome series for new customers builds trust, drives reviews, and lifts repeat purchase rate. Currently at 8.8% repeat — a welcome series typically lifts that to 14-18%.

projectedImpact.label: added per month from repeat lift

sequence.subject: Your Sprinkler Guard is on the way — here's how to install it
sequence.preview: 30-second installation. No tools required. Quick video inside.

sequence.subject: How's your install going?
sequence.preview: We'd love to see it. Reply with a photo and we'll send you a free pack.

sequence.subject: Quick favor — 30 seconds for a review?
sequence.preview: Other homeowners are looking. Your honest review helps them decide.

proposed.name: Sprinkler Care Monthly
proposed.rationale: Monthly newsletter on sprinkler care, lawn maintenance, and seasonal tips builds list engagement and drives organic repeat sales without paid ads.

sequence.subject: 5 things to do for your sprinklers this month
sequence.preview: Spring is when most damage happens. Here's how to get ahead of it.

proposed.name: Veteran-Owned Story
proposed.rationale: Lean into the veteran-owned and Made-in-USA story. Brand differentiator that competitors can't copy. Drives loyalty and word-of-mouth.

sequence.subject: Why we make Sprinkler Guard in America (and why it costs more)
sequence.preview: The full story — and what your support actually pays for.
